'''Skinning the Mynock''' was an area in [[Eskaron]] which at least one race course went through. The tunnel there split into a figure 8, which could potentially cause racers to cross each other's paths. A short distance after the first figure 8, the tunnel split again in another figure 8. In the middle of this 8 was a portion of tunnel which narrowed such that a pilot would have to flip upright to pass through. In crossing each other's paths or in the narrow tunnel, a pilot would come close enough to colliding to skin an attached [[Mynock/Legends|mynock]] off of a hull.

In [[32 BBY/Legends|32 BBY]], [[Blood Raptors]] member [[Gael Kinner]]'s [[G-59 Cannibalizer]] and [[Rodian/Legends|Rodian]] intimidated entrepreneur [[Teeloo]]'s [[YT-1210 light freighter/Legends|YT-1210]] ''[[Neeva-Beelo]]'' raced through Eskaron, passing through this area. Immediately after it, Kinner was forced to shoot the [[Z-95 Headhunter/Legends|Z-95]] of a [[Arraxx|pilot]] from another race.
